mechanism_summary: I2S solves structural roadblocks driving loser toward large valid IDAT images; havoc on small inputs randomly flips a high background byte nonzero, taking the invalid-color true branch.
one_line: I2S locks loser into valid images with zero background bytes; havoc flips nonzero byte

mechanism_summary: Baseline naive havoc mutation (BytesDelete/ByteFlip/BytesRandSet/TokenReplace) suffices to place the SHIN+SIN-DOT codepoint pair; cmplog loses because I2S diverts energy without helping, and ctx loses because context-indexed coverage fragments edge signal.
one_line: Naive havoc places Hebrew codepoint pair; I2S/ctx hurt rather than help
